events.text: Goal! Jordan 1, Algeria 0. Nizar Al Rashdan (Jordan) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Mousa Al Tamari.
Ramiz Zerrouki (Algeria) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Husam Abu Dahab (Jordan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Jordan 1, Algeria 1. Nadhir Benbouali (Algeria) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Riyad Mahrez with a cross following a corner.
Goal! Jordan 1, Algeria 2. Amine Gouiri (Algeria) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal following a corner.
